name: init_memento
description: MANDATORY: Call this tool at the beginning of every session before responding to the user. Loads behavior instructions plus active global and repository mementos into context.

repo_path.description: Optional: Absolute path to the current repository/workspace. If provided, scoped memory will be tied to this path instead of the server's working directory.

name: get_mementos
description: Returns active mementos. Use scope=all for both global and repository memory, or scope=global/repo to inspect just one area.

scope.description: Which memory area to read: all, global, or repo.

name: save_memento
description: Saves a persistent memento across sessions. The AI must choose whether it belongs to global memory or the current repository. Requires init_memento or get_mementos first.

name: save_conversation
description: Saves a conversation or summary as a memento with attachments. Only use this on explicit user request. Requires init_memento or get_mementos first.

text.description: Short memento text to inject in future sessions. It should mention that attachments exist.

conversation.description: Full conversation content to store in conversation.md.

summary.description: Narrative summary to store in summary.md.

name: save_memento_attachments
description: Copies files from the filesystem into the attachments directory of an existing memento. Only use this on explicit user request. Requires init_memento or get_mementos first.

paths.description: Absolute file paths to copy into the memento attachments directory.

name: get_memento_attachments
description: Reads and returns all attachment files for a specific memento. Use this only when the extra detail is needed. Requires init_memento or get_mementos first.

name: delete_memento
description: Deletes an existing memento by its exact ID, regardless of whether it is global or repository-scoped. Requires init_memento or get_mementos first.

name: move_memento
description: Moves an existing memento from global to repository scope or from repository to global scope. Use when the user asks to reclassify stored memory. Requires init_memento or get_mementos first.
